originalPrompt: Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS | Original request: create hello world app i can modify the text of the hello world colors through a frontend ui

subtasks.title: Initialize Express project
subtasks.description: Create a Node.js project, install Express and dev tools, scaffold folders (public, src), and serve index.html with static assets.
subtasks.successCriteria: Running npm start serves http://localhost:3000 and returns index.html without errors.

subtasks.title: Set up Tailwind CSS build
subtasks.description: Install tailwindcss, postcss, and autoprefixer, initialize configs, add input CSS with @tailwind directives, and build to public/styles.css.
subtasks.successCriteria: Tailwind classes are applied on the served page and visible style changes confirm the build works.

subtasks.title: Implement in-memory state store
subtasks.description: Create a module to hold current message text and color with sensible defaults and exported getters and setters.
subtasks.successCriteria: Store returns defaults on start and updates persist in memory during server runtime.

subtasks.title: Create REST API routes for message
subtasks.description: Add GET /api/message to return { text, color } and PUT /api/message to update fields using JSON body parsing.
subtasks.successCriteria: GET returns defaults, PUT updates state, and subsequent GET reflects changes with correct HTTP codes.

subtasks.title: Build Tailwind-based frontend UI
subtasks.description: Create index.html with inputs for text and color, a preview section, a Save button, and include a public/app.js script.
subtasks.successCriteria: UI renders with Tailwind styling; inputs and preview elements are visible and usable.

subtasks.title: Connect UI to API and update preview
subtasks.description: Implement app.js to fetch initial state on load, bind input events to update preview, and persist via PUT /api/message.
subtasks.successCriteria: Refreshing loads saved text and color; clicking Save persists changes and updates preview without errors.

subtasks.title: Add validation and sanitization
subtasks.description: Validate text length and trim input, restrict color to safe formats, sanitize outputs, and return clear 400 errors on bad input.
subtasks.successCriteria: Invalid inputs are rejected with helpful messages and valid inputs pass; UI shows errors gracefully.

subtasks.title: Test end-to-end and run dev
subtasks.description: Run the server and Tailwind watcher, verify load, edit, save, and refresh flows, and ensure no console or server errors.
subtasks.successCriteria: All flows work reliably on http://localhost:3000 with styles applied and no runtime errors.

subtasks.title: Optional: Persist state to JSON file
subtasks.description: Load initial state from a JSON file if present and write updates on change, handling file I/O errors safely.
subtasks.successCriteria: After server restart, the last saved message and color are restored from the JSON file.

decompositionStrategy: Start with Express scaffold, set up Tailwind build, add state and API, build UI, integrate with API, harden via validation, then test and optionally add persistence.
